title: Intense Pungent Mexican Cheese Chiles Rellenos
description: A pungent and dense Mexican dish featuring roasted poblano peppers stuffed with a mix of cheeses, pickle, and ginger cordial, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roast the poblano peppers in the oven for 30 minutes, then peel off the skin and remove the seeds.
In a bowl, mix together the monterey jack cheese, feta cheese, pickle, ginger cordial, garlic, and onion.
Stuff each roasted poblano pepper with the cheese mixture.
Dip each stuffed pepper in the beaten egg and then coat with flour.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the coated peppers until golden brown.
Serve the chiles rellenos hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
